title: koeleria skorpilii
intro: Koeleria skorpilii, also known as Bulgarian hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria skorpilii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria skorpilii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
